data.title: Prediction Market Competition Intensifies with New Perpetual Contracts
data.description: Hyperliquid is entering the prediction market, joining Polymarket and Kalshi in launching perpetual contracts. According to PANews, these three platforms are competing to become the leading one-stop trading hub. The introduction of perpetual contracts is reshaping the prediction market landscape, with cross-margining and risk engines playing crucial roles. The question remains as to which platform's strategy will prevail in this competitive environment.

data.title: Coinpost Terminal Partners with RootData for Enhanced Investment Insights
data.description:
Japanese cryptocurrency media outlet Coinpost's AI platform, Coinpost Terminal, has entered into a partnership with Web3 asset data platform RootData. According to ChainCatcher, this collaboration aims to enhance Coinpost Terminal's business processes by leveraging RootData's comprehensive data. Through the RootData API, Coinpost Terminal will offer higher quality investment information and market intelligence to local investors, financial institutions, and media in Japan.

Coinpost, a subsidiary of SBI Group, provides a variety of services in a secure and compliant environment. The company is also actively involved in organizing high-level B2B events and expanding its presence in the Web3 ecosystem through large conferences such as WebX.

data.title: DEX-to-CEX Spot Ratio Rises Despite Decline in DEX Volume
data.description: ARK Invest reported that the ratio of decentralized exchange (DEX) to centralized exchange (CEX) spot trading increased to approximately 27.4% in the first quarter of 2026, despite a 26% drop in DEX spot volume to around $832 billion. According to NS3.AI, this shift occurred during a risk-off period, with CoinGlass data indicating a 22% decline in Bitcoin's value. Additionally, stablecoin swap volume experienced a slight increase of 0.7%, reaching approximately $185 billion, while tokenized asset swaps surged by about 83% to roughly $4.6 billion.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Gold Falls Below $4,600 per Ounce
data.description: Spot gold prices have dropped below $4,600 per ounce, marking a 0.47% decline for the day. According to Jin10, this decrease reflects ongoing volatility in the precious metals market.

data.title: a16z Crypto calls on the U.S. SEC to optimize the regulatory framework for prediction markets and resolve jurisdictional conflicts.
data.description: a16z Crypto recently submitted a comment letter to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) regarding a proposed Notice of Prediction Market Rulemaking (ANPRM). a16z Crypto stated that prediction markets are experiencing explosive growth, with Kalshi's average weekly trading volume increasing from $300 million to $3 billion. The agency emphasized that by combining AI, blockchain, and prediction markets, AI agents can leverage on-chain programmable infrastructure to automatically hedge business risks without human intervention, thereby building a robust information aggregation system. Addressing existing regulatory obstacles, a16z Crypto made several recommendations: reaffirming the SEC's exclusive jurisdiction over Designated Contract Markets (DCMs) to eliminate conflicts of state law; introducing a mechanism similar to the ISDA Decision Committee to optimize contract settlement; and utilizing the auditability of on-chain transactions to monitor insider trading. Furthermore, a16z Crypto urged the SEC to adjust its core principles to accommodate decentralized protocols, allowing prediction markets to fully utilize blockchain technology to reduce transaction costs and increase transparency.

data.title: a16z Crypto Advocates for Reform in Prediction Market Regulation
data.description:
The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is currently at a pivotal moment in reforming the regulatory framework for prediction markets, according to ChainCatcher. Miles Jennings, the Head of Policy and General Counsel at a16z Crypto, along with others, have highlighted the transition of prediction markets from niche products to essential infrastructure.

With the integration of AI and blockchain-driven risk management models, prediction markets can enable AI agents to automatically hedge risks, adjust on-chain event contract positions in real-time, and play a central role in risk management, information aggregation, and authenticity verification. a16z Crypto warns that overly conservative regulatory frameworks could hinder the growth potential of prediction markets. Consequently, they have submitted a comment letter addressing statutory core principles and the application of CFTC regulations in prediction markets, public interest considerations related to event contracts, and other critical issues.

The letter includes five regulatory recommendations for prediction markets: granting the CFTC unified regulatory authority over event contracts, optimizing contract dispute resolution mechanisms, enhancing monitoring of insider trading and market manipulation, revisiting 'special rules,' and exploring clearer compliance pathways for on-chain prediction markets.

data.title: UK Housing Market Shows Resilience Amid Rising Mortgage Rates
data.description: UK home values saw an unexpected increase in April, according to one of the country's largest lenders. Bloomberg posted on X that this suggests the housing market is showing resilience despite the ongoing Iran war, which has led to higher mortgage rates. The data indicates that the housing sector is managing to withstand external pressures, maintaining stability in the face of geopolitical tensions affecting financial conditions.

data.title: Capital One 360 Class-Action Settlement Approved for $425 Million
data.description: A federal judge has approved a $425 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit involving Capital One 360. According to NS3.AI, the settlement pertains to customers who held 360 Savings accounts between September 18, 2019, and June 16, 2025. Eligible customers are set to receive payments automatically on or around July 27, 2026, provided there are no appeals that delay the process.

data.title: UK April Nationwide House Price Index Rises 3% Year-on-Year
data.description: The Nationwide House Price Index in the United Kingdom increased by 3% year-on-year in April, surpassing the expected 2.20% and matching the previous value of 2.20%. According to Jin10, this data reflects a stronger-than-anticipated growth in the housing market for the period.

data.title: Kaisar Network Secures $4 Million in Funding for Decentralized AI Platform
data.description: Kaisar Network, a decentralized AI computing Layer 1 network, has announced the completion of a $4 million funding round. According to ChainCatcher, $1 million of this amount was raised during a strategic pre-seed round. The network, incubated by Outlier Ventures and Borderless Capital, plans to launch Token AI, which will enable users to access decentralized GPU computing, AI credits, and proxy services.

data.title: SBI Holdings plans to bring bitbank into its controlling subsidiary through a capital business partnership.
data.description: SBI Holdings announced that it will officially launch negotiations for a capital and business cooperation agreement with bitbank operator bitbank Inc. on May 1, 2026. SBI Holdings stated that the cooperation aims to acquire a stake in bitbank, making it a merged subsidiary. The specific acquisition percentage and timing will be determined after due diligence. Bitbank had planned to list on the Tokyo Stock Exchange by mid-2025 and boasts an industry-leading security record. If the transaction is completed, the SBI Group will integrate its various major exchanges, including SBI VC Trade, BITPoint Japan, and bitbank, becoming Japan's largest cryptocurrency platform group. (CoinPost)

data.title: Bitmine Pledges 162,000 ETH Amid Scrutiny on Tether and Related Loans
data.description: Bitmine has announced a pledge of 162,000 ETH, estimated to be worth approximately $366 million. According to NS3.AI, this move comes as U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren and other lawmakers raise concerns about Tether and Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick regarding related-party loans. The scrutiny reflects ongoing regulatory attention in the cryptocurrency sector, focusing on transparency and financial practices.

data.title: Binance to Launch Alpha Airdrop and Trading Event
data.description: Binance announced on X that users should prepare for the Alpha airdrop and trading event scheduled for today at 15:00 (UTC+8). Participants with a minimum of 237 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to claim the token airdrop. The distribution will operate on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully claimed or the event concludes. Further details regarding the airdrop will be announced separately.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Resistance Amid Weak Spot Demand and Leverage
data.description: Bitcoin recently reached a price of $77,400, encountering potential resistance due to over $130 million in asks positioned between $76,700 and $79,300. According to NS3.AI, the analysis indicates that recent rallies have been short-lived, primarily due to weak spot demand and insufficient long leverage in the market.

data.title: Planet Midday News
data.description: 1. A suspected Multicoin address holds $26.9 million in HYPE, with a floating profit of approximately $10.5 million; 2. US Senators including Warren questioned Tether and Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick about related-party lending issues; 3. Bitmine pledged another 162,000 ETH, worth approximately $366 million; 4. Hundreds of ETH mainnet wallets are suspected of being attacked by the same address, some of which have been inactive for over 7 years, possibly related to LastPass security notes; 5. The US Congress is divided on whether the war with Iran should trigger the 60-day deadline of the War Powers Act.

data.title: Tokenized Gold Trading Volume Surpasses 2025 Total in Q1
data.description: Tokenized gold spot trading volume reached $90.7 billion in the first quarter, surpassing the $84.6 billion recorded throughout 2025, according to NS3.AI. CoinGecko reported that centralized exchanges facilitated the majority of this trading activity. The growth in commodity-based real-world assets was primarily driven by PAXG and XAUT, which accounted for 89.1% of the increase.

data.title: Bitmine Increases Ethereum Stake with Additional 162,088 ETH
data.description: Bitmine has expanded its Ethereum holdings by staking an additional 162,088 ETH, valued at $366 million. According to NS3.AI, this move brings the company's total staked Ethereum to 4,194,029 ETH. The increase in staked assets reflects Bitmine's ongoing commitment to the Ethereum network and its strategic positioning within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: RBC Raises AMD Target Price to $325
data.description: The Royal Bank of Canada has increased its target price for AMD (AMD.O) from $230 to $325. According to Jin10, this adjustment reflects the bank's updated outlook on AMD's market performance and potential growth.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Dr. Xiao Feng Discusses Privacy Computing and Blockchain Integration
data.description: Dr. Xiao Feng highlighted the capabilities of privacy computing, emphasizing its ability to make data usable without being visible. According to PANews, he stated that the true breakthrough lies in combining blockchain technology, which transforms data into callable, automatically billed AI tokens, unlocking commercial value without the need for permission.

data.title: Polymarket Introduces New Market on Epstein's Will Disclosure
data.description:
A new market has been launched on Polymarket regarding the disclosure of Jeffrey Epstein's will. According to Odaily, the market's settlement rules state that if any letter or written message by Epstein, intended as a will, is publicly disclosed before 11:59 PM Eastern Time on the specified deadline, the market outcome will be determined as 'Yes'; otherwise, it will be 'No'.

For a document to be recognized as Epstein's will, it must be confirmed by credible reports as being handwritten by him and must qualify as a will, final words, or a statement of similar nature.
